query:
-- Add gamification columns to users
ALTER TABLE users
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS xp INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanXP INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS level VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'bronze',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS fanLevel VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'supporter',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS streak INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastActiveDate VARCHAR(10) NULL;

-- Rewards table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS rewards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  name VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  type ENUM('level','achievement','promo','wars','review','supporter','verified','rare') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'achievement',
  rarity ENUM('common','rare','epic','legendary','hall_of_fame') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'common',
  requirements TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}',
  requiresAdminApproval BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  isActive BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  isPaused BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  badgeIcon VARCHAR(64),
  badgeColor VARCHAR(32),
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- User Rewards table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_rewards (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  rewardId INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('locked','unlocked','claimable','active','redeemed','expired','revoked') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'locked',
  unlockedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  claimedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  redeemedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  revokedAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  grantedBy INT NULL,
  earnedVia VARCHAR(256),
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- User Badges table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_badges (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  badge VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  label VARCHAR(64),
  rarity ENUM('common','rare','epic','legendary','hall_of_fame') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'common',
  badgeIcon VARCHAR(64),
  badgeColor VARCHAR(32),
  isVisible BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
  grantedBy INT NULL,
  grantedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  expiresAt TIMESTAMP NULL
);

-- XP Events table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS xp_events (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  amount INT NOT NULL,
  reason VARCHAR(128) NOT NULL,
  metadata TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Reward Logs table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS reward_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  rewardId INT NULL,
  action VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  performedBy INT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);
